title: Add full CoAP URI dispatch tests for gateway inbound resources
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-t2hn.8.2.1 qemu tests exercise the production POST handlers directly with real Zephyr coap_packet payloads, but do not prove Zephyr resource lookup/path dispatch for /inbound/text and /inbound/status. What needs to be done: add a no-hardware test that dispatches POST requests through Zephyr's CoAP resource matching/service path, verifies /inbound/text and /inbound/status are registered under CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE, and checks success and bad-request responses. Acceptance criteria: qemu/native_sim or Twister test passes without physical BLE/radio hardware and records exact commands/results.
notes:
Implemented no-hardware CoAP URI dispatch coverage for gateway inbound resources. Files changed: lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter/CMakeLists.txt, Kconfig, prj.conf, src/main.c. The test now sources gateway Kconfig so CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE and CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_MESSAGE_QUEUE_DEPTH are real Kconfig symbols, wires the gateway coap_resource_lichen_coap iterable section in the test image, verifies /inbound/text and /inbound/status resources are registered with the expected POST handlers, dispatches real POST packets through coap_handle_request_len(), checks FromRadio bytes match direct handler behavior, and covers bad-request payloads.

Review history: explorer/test-design agents identified production resources in inbound_coap.c and recommended native_sim/Twister coap_handle_request_len coverage. Earlier review findings fixed before closure: zero-initialize parsed option array; replace CMake-only CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE define with real Kconfig; remove misleading unknown-path ENOENT assertion because it did not prove service-facing 4.04 behavior; remove duplicate Kconfig.zephyr source; replace broad CONFIG_COMPILER_OPT stringop-overflow waiver with target_compile_options(drivers__bluetooth PRIVATE -Wno-error=stringop-overflow), scoped to Zephyr native_sim BT_USERCHAN driver. Final independent reviews by agents 019f21ac-0323, 019f21ac-0378, and 019f21ac-03c2 found no P0/P1/P2 issues; two ran git diff --check. Residual limitation recorded by review: this test proves iterable CoAP resource registration/dispatch, not the runtime COAP_SERVICE_DEFINE binding from gateway src/main.c, because that app main is not linked in this harness.

Validation on EC2 us-east-2a instance i-07f1b0520908d32be using EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 mounted at /mnt/lichen-zephyr and clean worktree /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-coap-dispatch. Primary EBS worktree was dirty and preserved. Host notes: bootstrap-host.sh hit Ubuntu Noble awscli apt-candidate issue; installed minimal build deps and pinned Zephyr venv setuptools to 80.10.2 so Twister can import pkg_resources. Local macOS native_sim remains blocked by Zephyr POSIX arch Linux-only guard.

Commands/results: west build -p always -b native_sim -d build/meshtastic_gateway_adapter_dispatch lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -- -DZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed. west build -d build/meshtastic_gateway_adapter_dispatch -t run passed: SUITE PASS 100.00%, meshtastic_gateway_adapter pass=27 fail=0 skip=0. west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -p native_sim --outdir twister-out-meshtastic-gateway-adapter --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen passed: 1/1 configurations, 27 test cases, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 skipped, 0 Twister warnings, 18.49s. Notable runtime warnings were expected native_sim/test-environment warnings: test entropy source, missing Bluetooth HCI device, eth_posix zeth creation, and existing stale-response -107 warning. Build evidence: generated config contains CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_BLE=y, CONFIG_LORA_LICHEN_GATEWAY_MESSAGE_QUEUE_DEPTH=3, CONFIG_BT=y, CONFIG_BT_PERIPHERAL=y, CONFIG_BT_MAX_CONN=1, CONFIG_COAP_SERVER=y, CONFIG_COAP_SERVICE_PENDING_MESSAGES=2, CONFIG_COAP_SERVICE_OBSERVERS=1. Iterable section map: _coap_resource_lichen_coap_list_start=0x000008d4, end=0x0000093c. native_sim size: text=261481 data=8138 bss=75744 dec=345363 hex=54513.
EC2 cleanup completed after validation: synced and unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr on i-07f1b0520908d32be; detached EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited until state=available; terminated instance i-07f1b0520908d32be and waited until state=terminated; deleted temporary security group sg-0521d26b64693ea8c.
close_reason: Implemented and validated no-hardware gateway inbound CoAP URI dispatch tests for /inbound/text and /inbound/status; EC2 native_sim direct run and Twister passed 27/27; three final review passes clean.
